description: Top 1,000 NuGet packages whose IDs do not start with System., Azure., or Microsoft., ranked by total downloads from the NuGet search API. README data records both the dotnet-inspect @readme package README selector and the literal root README.md path.

selection.filter: Scan download-ranked NuGet search results; keep IDs that do not start with System., Azure., or Microsoft.; de-duplicate by package ID; take 1000.
